title: Fry-White Delight
description: A savory, crisp, and low-calorie-friendly Ukrainian brunch dish made with strong white flour, served as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
Mix the flour, milk, and eggs in a bowl until you get a smooth batter. It should be thick enough to coat the dough balls well but not too stiff.
Roll small pieces of yeast dough into balls about the size of golf balls.
Dip each ball gently into the batter mixture until fully coated.
Place the coated balls on the preheated pan and fry for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown. Turn with a spatula to fry the other side.
Remove from heat once they are crispy and serve immediately.
